role_title: Growth Merchant Lead - Emerging Markets Montana

location.office_time_required: field sales with 70%+ travel; some time working remotely

level_signals: 4+ years of in-person, outside B2B sales experience

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4+ years of in-person, outside B2B sales experience (field experience is required)
must_haves.qualifier: in-person, outside B2B; field experience required

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have proven success running short, high-velocity, full sales cycles – including same-day closes.
You have strong prospecting, hunting, and negotiation skills.
You are energized by extensive travel – spending 70%+ of your time in the field, including overnight travel inside and outside of your home state.
You have demonstrated success operating autonomously and thrive in environments where you will create the playbook, not follow one.
You are comfortable using Salesforce, Google Workspace, and sales productivity tools.
You are entrepreneurial, adaptable, and motivated building and scaling new markets.
You will need to live by or in proximity to a major airport.

scope.surface: Emerging Markets (T4–T5 geographies) — Montana region; SMB restaurant and retailer merchant acquisition
scope.business_model: B2B field sales, revenue-share agreements with SMB merchants on on-demand delivery platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Number of new merchant partnerships closed
core_responsibilities: Expand DoorDash's presence by traveling to emerging markets and developing new restaurant partnerships.
Lead end-to-end, in-person sales cycles– prospecting, pitching, negotiating, and closing.
Sell business owners on DoorDash's value and secure revenue-share agreements.
Consistently execute high-volume field activity and close deals within days.
Build scalable approaches and playbooks to accelerate market expansion.
Shape DoorDash's expansion strategy in rural economies.
Have an outsized impact on growth in high-priority markets.

green_flags: Clear ownership of a specific region (Montana emerging markets) with well-defined scope
High-priority company initiative — T4–T5 geographies represent 40%+ of remaining restaurant opportunities
Ongoing application acceptance signals active hiring pipeline
Explicit mention of career development and cross-functional resources
DoorDash is a large, well-capitalized company with known brand
red_flags: 70%+ travel requirement including overnight travel is very demanding
Role is highly autonomous with limited structure — may not suit all sales professionals
Rural/emerging market focus may limit deal sizes compared to core urban markets

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years required and reporting structure, not explicitly stated)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
location.type set to 'hybrid' — role is primarily field/travel with some remote work; no traditional office hybrid arrangement
compensation.equity_mentioned: false (not mentioned anywhere in JD)
ambiguities: Location type is ambiguous: the role is described as 'field sales' with 70%+ travel and 'some time working remotely' — not a traditional hybrid or remote role. Classified as 'hybrid' as closest match but the primary work mode is field travel.
Cities listed: no specific Montana city is named; the role covers the Montana region generally. cities_listed left empty.
